```{r}
# ============================================================
# LEADING-EDGE pathway heatmaps across 0nM / 17nM / 68nM (BATCH-CORRECTED)
# MERGED across comparisons:
#   - For each term, union of leading-edge genes across comps (unique genes)
#   - Optional row annotation showing which comparisons contributed the gene
# Outputs: ONE heatmap per term (not per comp)
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(grid)
  library(limma)
  library(matrixStats)
})

# ----------------------------
# 0) Paths / comparisons
# ----------------------------
run_label <- "2026_03_23_GSEA_edgeR_3comparisons_signedlogP"
comparisons <- c("DRAXIN_vs_ctrl", "diluted_vs_ctrl", "DRAXIN_vs_diluted")

project_dir <- getwd()
base_dir  <- file.path(project_dir, "bulkRNAseq", run_label)

expr_path <- file.path(project_dir, "bulkRNAseq", "Heatmaps_input", "expr_logCPM_TMM.rds")
meta_path <- file.path(project_dir, "bulkRNAseq", "Heatmaps_input", "meta2.csv")

stopifnot(file.exists(expr_path), file.exists(meta_path))

out_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "LEADINGEDGE_HEATMAPS_MERGEDTERMS_ALLCONDS_BATCHCORR")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ----------------------------
# 1) Load expression + metadata
# ----------------------------
expr_mat <- readRDS(expr_path)

meta <- read_csv(meta_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |> as.data.frame()
stopifnot("sample" %in% colnames(meta))
rownames(meta) <- meta$sample
meta$sample <- NULL

stopifnot(all(colnames(expr_mat) %in% rownames(meta)))
meta <- meta[colnames(expr_mat), , drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(all(colnames(expr_mat) == rownames(meta)))

# strip ".1" etc in gene rownames if present
rownames(expr_mat) <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", rownames(expr_mat))

stopifnot("condition" %in% colnames(meta))
meta$condition <- factor(meta$condition, levels = c("ctrl", "diluted_DRAXIN", "DRAXIN"))
cond_map <- c(ctrl="0nM", diluted_DRAXIN="17nM", DRAXIN="68nM")
meta$condition_nm <- factor(cond_map[as.character(meta$condition)], levels = c("0nM","17nM","68nM"))
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 1b) Batch + experiment columns
# ----------------------------
batch_var <- "batch3"
if (!batch_var %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("Batch column not found in meta: '", batch_var, "'. Available: ",
       paste(colnames(meta), collapse=", "))
}

exp_var <- dplyr::case_when(
  "exp" %in% colnames(meta) ~ "exp",
  "experiment" %in% colnames(meta) ~ "experiment",
  "Experiment" %in% colnames(meta) ~ "Experiment",
  "run" %in% colnames(meta) ~ "run",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)
if (is.na(exp_var)) {
  meta$exp <- "exp1"
  exp_var <- "exp"
}

meta[[batch_var]] <- as.factor(meta[[batch_var]])
meta[[exp_var]]   <- as.factor(meta[[exp_var]])

# ----------------------------
# 1c) Batch correction (keeps condition effects)
# ----------------------------
expr_mat <- removeBatchEffect(
  expr_mat,
  batch  = meta[[batch_var]],
  design = model.matrix(~ condition_nm, data = meta)
)

# ----------------------------
# 2) Mapping helpers (core_enrichment IDs -> expr rownames)
# ----------------------------
detect_keytype <- function(rownms) {
  if (any(grepl("^ENSG", rownms))) return("ENSEMBL")
  if (all(grepl("^[0-9]+$", rownms))) return("ENTREZID")
  "SYMBOL"
}

map_entrez <- function(entrez) {
  entrez <- unique(as.character(entrez))
  mp <- suppressWarnings(
    AnnotationDbi::select(
      org.Hs.eg.db,
      keys = entrez,
      keytype = "ENTREZID",
      columns = c("SYMBOL","ENSEMBL")
    )
  ) |> tibble::as_tibble()

  mp |>
    mutate(ENTREZID = as.character(ENTREZID)) |>
    arrange(ENTREZID, is.na(SYMBOL), is.na(ENSEMBL)) |>
    distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE)
}

symbols_to_expr_ids <- function(expr_mat, symbols) {
  symbols <- unique(as.character(symbols))
  symbols <- symbols[!is.na(symbols) & symbols != ""]

  keytype <- detect_keytype(rownames(expr_mat))

  if (keytype == "SYMBOL") {
    ids <- intersect(symbols, rownames(expr_mat))
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=setNames(ids, ids)))
  }

  mp <- suppressWarnings(
    AnnotationDbi::select(
      org.Hs.eg.db,
      keys = symbols,
      keytype = "SYMBOL",
      columns = c("SYMBOL","ENSEMBL","ENTREZID")
    )
  ) |> tibble::as_tibble() |> distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE)

  if (keytype == "ENSEMBL") {
    ids <- mp$ENSEMBL
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$ENSEMBL
  } else if (keytype == "ENTREZID") {
    ids <- as.character(mp$ENTREZID)
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- as.character(mp$ENTREZID)
  } else {
    stop("Unexpected keytype: ", keytype)
  }

  ids <- ids[!is.na(ids) & ids != ""]
  ids <- intersect(ids, rownames(expr_mat))

  lbl <- lbl[ids]
  lbl[is.na(lbl) | lbl==""] <- ids[is.na(lbl) | lbl==""]
  list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl)
}

entrez_to_expr_ids <- function(expr_mat, entrez) {
  entrez <- unique(as.character(entrez))
  entrez <- entrez[!is.na(entrez) & entrez != ""]
  keytype <- detect_keytype(rownames(expr_mat))

  mp <- map_entrez(entrez)

  if (keytype == "ENTREZID") {
    ids <- intersect(mp$ENTREZID, rownames(expr_mat))
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$ENTREZID
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids]))
  }
  if (keytype == "ENSEMBL") {
    ids <- intersect(mp$ENSEMBL, rownames(expr_mat))
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$ENSEMBL
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids]))
  }
  ids <- intersect(mp$SYMBOL, rownames(expr_mat))
  lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$SYMBOL
  list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids])
}

guess_id_space <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) return("UNKNOWN")
  if (all(grepl("^[0-9]+$", x))) return("ENTREZID")
  if (any(grepl("^ENSG", x))) return("ENSEMBL")
  "SYMBOL"
}

map_le_to_expr <- function(expr_mat, le_genes) {
  le_genes <- unique(as.character(le_genes))
  le_genes <- le_genes[!is.na(le_genes) & le_genes != ""]
  if (length(le_genes) == 0) return(list(ids=character(0), label_map=character(0)))

  space <- guess_id_space(le_genes)
  if (space == "ENTREZID") return(entrez_to_expr_ids(expr_mat, le_genes))
  if (space == "SYMBOL")   return(symbols_to_expr_ids(expr_mat, le_genes))

  keytype <- detect_keytype(rownames(expr_mat))
  mp <- suppressWarnings(
    AnnotationDbi::select(
      org.Hs.eg.db, keys = le_genes, keytype = "ENSEMBL",
      columns = c("SYMBOL","ENSEMBL","ENTREZID")
    )
  ) |> tibble::as_tibble() |> distinct(ENSEMBL, .keep_all = TRUE)

  if (keytype == "ENSEMBL") {
    ids <- intersect(mp$ENSEMBL, rownames(expr_mat))
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$ENSEMBL
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids]))
  } else if (keytype == "ENTREZID") {
    ids <- intersect(as.character(mp$ENTREZID), rownames(expr_mat))
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- as.character(mp$ENTREZID)
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids]))
  } else {
    ids <- intersect(mp$SYMBOL, rownames(expr_mat))
    lbl <- mp$SYMBOL; names(lbl) <- mp$SYMBOL
    return(list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl[ids]))
  }
}

zscore_rows <- function(m) t(scale(t(as.matrix(m))))
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 3) Leading-edge extraction
# ----------------------------
get_leading_edge <- function(gsea_obj, term_id) {
  res <- gsea_obj@result |> as.data.frame()
  hit <- res[res$ID == term_id, , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(hit) == 0) return(NULL)  # for merged mode: return NULL instead of stop
  core <- as.character(hit$core_enrichment[1])
  if (is.na(core) || core == "") return(character(0))
  strsplit(core, "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
}

# ----------------------------
# 4) Color palettes
# ----------------------------
cond_cols <- c("0nM"="#1b9e77", "17nM"="#d95f02", "68nM"="#7570b3")
make_level_colors <- function(x) {
  lv <- levels(as.factor(x))
  cols <- circlize::rand_color(length(lv))
  names(cols) <- lv
  cols
}
batch_cols <- make_level_colors(meta[[batch_var]])
exp_cols   <- make_level_colors(meta[[exp_var]])

# ----------------------------
# 5) RDS path builders
# ----------------------------
rds_go_bp <- function(comp) file.path(base_dir, comp, "GO",
  paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseGO_BP.rds"))
rds_go_mf <- function(comp) file.path(base_dir, comp, "GO",
  paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseGO_MF.rds"))
rds_kegg <- function(comp) file.path(base_dir, comp, "KEGG",
  paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseKEGG.rds"))
rds_hallmark <- function(comp) {
  p1 <- file.path(base_dir, comp, "MSigDB",
                  paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__msig_H.rds"))
  p2 <- file.path(base_dir, comp, "MSigDB_ALL", "H",
                  paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__msig_H.rds"))
  if (file.exists(p1)) return(p1)
  if (file.exists(p2)) return(p2)
  return(NA_character_)
}

# ----------------------------
# 6) Targets
# ----------------------------
targets <- list(
  list(collection="HALLMARK", rds_fun=rds_hallmark,
       term_id="HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION", label="HM_OXPHOS_LE"),
  list(collection="HALLMARK", rds_fun=rds_hallmark,
       term_id="HALLMARK_G2M_CHECKPOINT", label="HM_G2M_LE"),
  list(collection="HALLMARK", rds_fun=rds_hallmark,
       term_id="HALLMARK_DNA_REPAIR", label="HM_DNA_REPAIR_LE"),
  list(collection="HALLMARK", rds_fun=rds_hallmark,
       term_id="HALLMARK_CHOLESTEROL_HOMEOSTASIS", label="HM_CHOLESTEROL_HOMEOSTASIS_LE"),

  list(collection="GO_MF", rds_fun=rds_go_mf,
       term_id="GO:0003954", label="GOMF_NADH_DEHYDROGENASE_ACTIVITY_LE"),
  list(collection="GO_MF", rds_fun=rds_go_mf,
       term_id="GO:0005506", label="GOMF_IRON_ION_BINDING_LE"),
  list(collection="GO_MF", rds_fun=rds_go_mf,
       term_id="GO:0015453", label="GOMF_OXIDOREDUCTION_TRANSMEMBRANE_TRANSPORTER_ACTIVITY_LE"),
  list(collection="GO_MF", rds_fun=rds_go_mf,
       term_id="GO:0050839", label="GOMF_CELL_ADHESION_MOLECULE_BINDING"),

  list(collection="GO_BP", rds_fun=rds_go_bp,
       term_id="GO:0033627", label="GOBP_INTEGRIN_MEDIATED_CELL_ADHESION_LE"),

  list(collection="KEGG", rds_fun=rds_kegg,
       term_id="hsa04216", label="KEGG_FERROPTOSIS_LE")
)

# ----------------------------
# 7) MERGE leading-edge genes across comparisons (union + membership)
# ----------------------------
merge_leadingedge_across_comparisons <- function(expr_mat, comparisons, tgt,
                                                require_present_in_at_least = 1) {
  # Returns:
  #   ids: union expr IDs (unique)
  #   label_map: best label for those ids (SYMBOL if possible)
  #   mem: data.frame row per id with logical columns per comparison
  mem_list <- list()
  label_map_all <- c()

  for (comp in comparisons) {
    rds_path <- tgt$rds_fun(comp)
    if (is.na(rds_path) || !file.exists(rds_path)) {
      mem_list[[comp]] <- character(0)
      next
    }

    g_obj <- readRDS(rds_path)
    le_raw <- get_leading_edge(g_obj, tgt$term_id)
    if (is.null(le_raw)) {  # term not in that comparison result
      mem_list[[comp]] <- character(0)
      next
    }

    mp <- map_le_to_expr(expr_mat, le_raw)
    mem_list[[comp]] <- unique(mp$ids)

    # accumulate labels (later we’ll pick per-id)
    if (length(mp$label_map)) {
      label_map_all <- c(label_map_all, mp$label_map)
    }
  }

  all_ids <- unique(unlist(mem_list, use.names = FALSE))
  if (!length(all_ids)) {
    return(list(ids=character(0), label_map=character(0), mem=data.frame()))
  }

  # membership matrix
  mem_df <- data.frame(expr_id = all_ids, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  for (comp in comparisons) {
    mem_df[[comp]] <- mem_df$expr_id %in% mem_list[[comp]]
  }

  # filter: keep genes that appear in at least N comparisons (default 1 = union)
  mem_df$n_comp <- rowSums(mem_df[, comparisons, drop = FALSE])
  mem_df <- mem_df[mem_df$n_comp >= require_present_in_at_least, , drop = FALSE]
  ids <- mem_df$expr_id

  # label_map: prefer first non-empty mapping for each id
  # label_map_all may have duplicates; keep first non-empty per name
  if (length(label_map_all)) {
    # ensure named vector
    label_map_all <- label_map_all[!is.na(names(label_map_all)) & names(label_map_all) != ""]
    # keep first occurrence per id
    label_map_all <- label_map_all[!duplicated(names(label_map_all))]
    lbl <- label_map_all[ids]
  } else {
    lbl <- setNames(ids, ids)
    lbl <- lbl[ids]
  }
  lbl[is.na(lbl) | lbl == ""] <- ids[is.na(lbl) | lbl == ""]
  list(ids=ids, label_map=lbl, mem=mem_df)
}
```

```{r}
# ----------------------------
# 8) Heatmap plotting (MERGED) + optional row membership annotation
# ----------------------------
plot_leadingedge_heatmap_merged <- function(expr_mat, meta, ids, label_map, mem_df,
                                            title, out_pdf,
                                            top_n = 80,
                                            show_membership = TRUE) {
  if (length(ids) < 3) {
    message("  Skipping (too few mapped genes): ", title, " (n=", length(ids), ")")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  # sample order: condition -> batch -> exp -> sample
  keep_samps <- rownames(meta)[meta$condition_nm %in% c("0nM","17nM","68nM")]
  ord_df <- meta[keep_samps, , drop = FALSE]
  ord_df$.sample <- rownames(ord_df)

  o <- order(
    ord_df$condition_nm,
    ord_df[[batch_var]],
    ord_df[[exp_var]],
    ord_df$.sample
  )
  samp_order <- ord_df$.sample[o]

  m <- expr_mat[ids, samp_order, drop = FALSE]

  # row labels
  rlab <- unname(label_map[rownames(m)])
  rlab[is.na(rlab) | rlab==""] <- rownames(m)[is.na(rlab) | rlab==""]
  rownames(m) <- make.unique(rlab)

  # If too many genes: keep top variable genes, BUT keep membership aligned
  if (is.finite(top_n) && nrow(m) > top_n) {
    vv <- matrixStats::rowVars(as.matrix(m), na.rm = TRUE)
    ord <- order(vv, decreasing = TRUE)
    keep <- rownames(m)[ord][seq_len(top_n)]
    m <- m[keep, , drop = FALSE]

    # rebuild ids by matching rownames back to expr ids via label_map (best-effort)
    # safer: subset mem_df to original expr ids that were kept by rowname matching
    # We do: keep any mem row whose label equals a kept rowname OR whose expr_id is in ids still.
    # First create lookup label for each expr id:
    label_for_id <- unname(label_map[mem_df$expr_id])
    label_for_id[is.na(label_for_id) | label_for_id==""] <- mem_df$expr_id[is.na(label_for_id) | label_for_id==""]
    label_for_id <- make.unique(label_for_id)
    mem_df$._label_unique <- label_for_id
    mem_df <- mem_df[mem_df$._label_unique %in% rownames(m), , drop = FALSE]
  }

  mz <- zscore_rows(m)
  meta_aligned <- meta[colnames(mz), , drop = FALSE]

  # column annotations (same as your version)
  ha_top <- HeatmapAnnotation(
    condition = meta_aligned$condition_nm,
    batch     = meta_aligned[[batch_var]],
    exp       = meta_aligned[[exp_var]],
    col = list(condition = cond_cols, batch = batch_cols, exp = exp_cols),
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      condition = list(title = "Condition"),
      batch     = list(title = batch_var),
      exp       = list(title = exp_var)
    )
  )

  # optional row annotation: which comparisons contributed the gene
  ra <- NULL
  if (isTRUE(show_membership) && nrow(mem_df)) {
    # align mem rows to mz rows via the unique label we used
    # create the same unique labels for current mz rows
    # (mz rownames already unique)
    # Build a data.frame in mz row order:
    mem_use <- mem_df
    if (!"._label_unique" %in% names(mem_use)) {
      label_for_id <- unname(label_map[mem_use$expr_id])
      label_for_id[is.na(label_for_id) | label_for_id==""] <- mem_use$expr_id[is.na(label_for_id) | label_for_id==""]
      mem_use$._label_unique <- make.unique(label_for_id)
    }
    mem_use <- mem_use[match(rownames(mz), mem_use$._label_unique), , drop = FALSE]

    # comparisons columns may include NAs if mismatch; convert to FALSE
    for (cc in comparisons) mem_use[[cc]][is.na(mem_use[[cc]])] <- FALSE

    ra <- rowAnnotation(
      `LE in...` = ComplexHeatmap::anno_simple(
        as.matrix(mem_use[, comparisons, drop = FALSE]) * 1,
        col = c("0"="white","1"="black"),
        gp = grid::gpar(col = NA)
      ),
      annotation_name_side = "top",
      annotation_name_gp = grid::gpar(fontsize = 8)
    )
  }

  ht <- Heatmap(
    mz, name = "z",
    top_annotation = ha_top,
    left_annotation = ra,
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    cluster_rows    = FALSE,
    show_row_names  = TRUE,
    row_names_gp    = grid::gpar(fontsize = 7),
    column_split    = meta_aligned$condition_nm,
    column_title    = title
  )

  grDevices::pdf(out_pdf, width = 12, height = 6.5, useDingbats = FALSE)
  draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
  grDevices::dev.off()
  message("  Wrote: ", out_pdf)
}

# ----------------------------
# 9) Run: ONE heatmap per term (merged across comparisons)
# ----------------------------
for (tgt in targets) {
  message("\n===============================")
  message("Merged term: ", tgt$label, " | ", tgt$collection)
  message("===============================")

  merged <- tryCatch(
    merge_leadingedge_across_comparisons(expr_mat, comparisons, tgt,
                                         require_present_in_at_least = 1),  # set 2 if you want overlap-only
    error = function(e) {
      message("  FAILED merge: ", tgt$label, " | ", conditionMessage(e))
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
  if (is.null(merged) || length(merged$ids) < 3) {
    message("  Skipping: insufficient genes after merge for ", tgt$label)
    next
  }

  title <- paste0(
    tgt$label, " | LE union across: ",
    paste(comparisons, collapse = " / ")
  )

  out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(tgt$label, "__MERGED_LEADINGEDGE_ALLCONDS_BATCHCORR_heatmap.pdf"))

  plot_leadingedge_heatmap_merged(
    expr_mat  = expr_mat,
    meta      = meta,
    ids       = merged$ids,
    label_map = merged$label_map,
    mem_df    = merged$mem,
    title     = title,
    out_pdf   = out_pdf,
    top_n     = 80,         # set Inf to show ALL union genes
    show_membership = FALSE  # adds row block showing which comps contributed
  )
}

message("\nDone. Merged leading-edge heatmaps in: ", out_dir)

```
